g.title: Entry point for all inference telemetry

ul.li: Reservoir Sampling: Sampler uses a fixed-size reservoir to avoid memory exhaustion during high traffic.
Latency Histograms: Buckets are exponentially spaced (e.g., 1ms, 2ms, 5ms, 10ms, 25ms...).
K-S Test: Performed every 1000 samples or 1 hour, whichever comes first.
Log Buffer: Structured Logger uses a 5MB ring buffer to ensure zero-loss request logging.
